$notes: Hero banner image library. Each entry powers the 'change image' chip on merchant hero slots — the platform queries this file by intersecting merchant.trade_keywords with entries[].keywords_strict (strict match only). Extracted theme palette can be applied to merchant brand tokens when they select an image.
$brand_policy: NO third-party brand logos, watermarks, or channel identity marks visible in any hero image (FAKRO, Youngman, Screwfix, Wickes, etc.). Only exception: brand marks that are physically stamped on the product itself (chisel steel, spirit-level face, tool casing) — those are permanent product features. Any image with a burned-in overlay logo (marketing shots from manufacturers) must be rejected. Site Interest 2026-07-16.

$field_reference.subject: one-line human-readable description
$field_reference.keywords_strict: exact search terms this image legitimately serves. Merchant search intent must intersect this list for the image to surface.
$field_reference.vibe: brand-tone descriptor (working / retail / premium / craft / dramatic / etc.)
$field_reference.sibling_group_id: groups related images (e.g. same photoshoot, same tradesperson persona)
$field_reference.hero_use_case: one-paragraph advisor note on best-fit merchant positioning
$field_reference.burned_in_text: image has text overlay already — skip additional text

Best-fit for staircase-installer / staircase-manufacturer / carpenter / joiner canteens.
sibling_groups.window-supply-chain: Windows across the full chain — manufacture (factory / production line), delivery (loaded van / crated frames), and installation (glazier fitting on-site). Best-fit for window installers, window manufacturers, and glazing suppliers who want to signal end-to-end capability.
sibling_groups.entrance-gates-house: Finished entrance-gate installs on residential houses — driveway gates, front gates, wrought-iron + wooden + automatic variants. Best-fit for gate installers, gate manufacturers, and fabricators offering bespoke house-entrance solutions.
sibling_groups.apprenticeship-recruitment: Marketing banner series for /apprenticeships — recruitment surface for 16+ UK youth applying to local trades. Three variants: (1) right-aligned CTA space suits 'Learn More' / 'Apply Today' overlays, (2) needs a button placed directly beneath, (3) burned-in 'start free' text so no additional CTA copy needed — used on the apply-form page. The Network commitment: 'supports UK trade youth' — every apprentice we route to a local trade is a future networker.
sibling_groups.vault-editorial-covers: Per-article editorial cover images for /vault long-form guides. Each cover pairs 1:1 with a specific article (cowboy red-flags, hiring questions, fair quote anatomy, payment schedules, plumber-vs-Gas-Safe, kitchen fitters vs bespoke joiners, extension timeline, bathroom resale). The ninth entry is the /vault hub hero banner with burned-in 'The Vault / Construction' branding — used at the top of the hub with no text overlay. Warm amber + black brand palette across the set.
sibling_groups.cost-project-covers: Per-project hero images pinned to /cost/[project] pages via PROJECT_CONTENT[slug].heroOverride. Used instead of the pickHeroForTrade fallback when we have an authored cover.
sibling_groups.cta-backgrounds: Full-bleed background images sitting behind CTA container copy — dark scrim overlay recommended for legibility. Used on marketing CTAs (e.g. 'Post one job — reach every verified trade' on /trades).
sibling_groups.answers-editorial-covers: Per-question editorial cover images pinned to /answers/[slug] pages via ANSWERS[i].heroImage. Rendered above the highlighted short answer. Optional — most Q&A pages ship without a cover; only add one for evergreen high-volume queries where the visual materially helps comprehension or SERP CTR.
sibling_groups.tool-hero-covers: Hero images for interactive tool pages (/check-quote, and future tools). Rendered beside the tool copy in a two-column layout. object-contain so the authored image is never cropped.
sibling_groups.trades-hub-covers: Per-trade card covers for the /trades hub. Pinned via TRADE_HUB_COVER map so the hub visuals stay consistent regardless of hero-library lookup order. Rendered aspect-[3/2] + object-contain — no cropping. One authored cover per TradeSlug.
sibling_groups.emergency-hero-banner: Full-bleed hero banner sitting above the Life-safety-first callout on /emergency + /emergency/[slug]. Signals urgency; no text overlay required — image carries the visual weight.
sibling_groups.networkers-tv-hub-hero: Full-bleed background image for the /videos (Networkers TV) hub hero container. Text overlaid with dark linear-gradient scrim for legibility. Object-cover full-bleed per the hero rule.
sibling_groups.networkers-tv-video-frame: Placeholder frame image used on video cards where thumbnail_url is null. Rendered inside the aspect-video slot on hub grid + category browse pages + video leaf poster. Auto-replaced the moment the trade uploads a thumbnail or the Phase 2 AI pipeline extracts one from the video.
sibling_groups.networkers-tv-play-button: Centered play-button icon overlaid on video thumbnails + posters. On grid cards: always visible, decorative signal that the card is a video. On the leaf video-player: click-target that hides itself and starts video playback.
